_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: take my word for it

sentences.en: ★ Of course, you don't need to take my word for it, old sport.
sentences.ko: ★ 물론 내 말만 믿을 필요는 없네, 친구.

sentences.en: At lunch, I'm going to introduce you to one of New York's most distinguished businessmen — a Mr. Meyer Wolfshiem, my good friend.
sentences.ko: 점심에서 뉴욕 최고의 사업가 한 분을 소개해주지 — 내 좋은 친구, 마이어 울프심 씨야.

sentences.en: He will confirm all I have told you and vouch for my good character.
sentences.ko: 내가 한 말을 전부 확인해주고 내 인품도 보증해줄 걸세.
